MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-26-2018 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2018 Set For Trial On Jan-22-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Melanie O'Brien, (415)649-6203 for Plaintiff/Opposing party Revecca Fox.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT PEARL STREET VENTURES LLC, BRIT HAHN, BARSHA PROPERTIES LLC MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Request for Punitive Damages is sufficiently stated. Order signed in Open Court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Melanie O'Brien, (415)649-6203 for Plaintiff/Opposing party Revecca Fox.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT PEARL STREET VENTURES LLC, BRIT HAHN, BARSHA PROPERTIES LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for Tenant Harassment, Fraud and Negligent Misrepresentation. Order signed in Open Court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2018 Continued To Jun-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
